sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105223" key="tri/sefqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐ´σ-εφθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice-boiled.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:3:13:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.13.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:7:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:9:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
